content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: team(6) ∧ devops(part_time) ∧ timeline("4months") ∧ traffic(modest_initial) ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ future_split_possible(billing,core_app)
H: one_team_one_db_favors_low_coordination ∧ short_timeline_favors_single_deployable ∧ future_boundary_exists_but_not_immediate ∧ modular_monolith_allows_later_extraction ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith)
P: build_single_deployable_with_strict_domain_modules → separate_billing_and_core_with_clear_interfaces → use_postgresql_with_schema_and_migration_discipline → defer_service_extraction_until_post_release_signal
R: ! module_boundaries_can_erode_without_enforcement ∧ ! later_extraction_cost_if_shared_state_spreads ∧ ! single_deployable_limits_independent_scaling
A: default_to_modular_monolith ∧ it_matches_team_size_timeline_and_operational_capacity ∧ it_keeps_the_billing_boundary_ready_for_a_future_split_without_overengineering_now

[AUDIT]
chosen_for_low_ops_and_fast_delivery_with_postgres
